pageContext.name: Skeletor on Throne Deluxe
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Skeletor on Throne Deluxe! Based on the original references from Masters of the Universe, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   MOTU fans, don't miss your chance to add the Skeletor on Throne Deluxe to your Masters of the Universe collection!
